calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-16-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Erika Williams, Esq. 323-739-1647 Law Office specially appearing for Plaintiff's counsel.
Angela Denman 616-581-4222 Defendant in Pro Per. (In-person)

Hearing is held

The Court poses questions re payment of judgment and claims of exemption from Ms. Denman.
Ms. Denman responds to the Court's questions.
Ms. Williams states Defendant has not met the burden, requests denial in entirety or limit exemption, no payments received on debt.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF SIERRA MANAGED ASSET PLAN, LLC. A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Before the court is Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
